description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named VCMI that runs on push to features/*, beta, master, and develop branches, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build and test the project on multiple platforms, including Linux, macOS, Windows, Android, and iOS. It checks out the repository, sets up dependencies, and runs a series of steps including ccache setup, Conan setup, Java setup, build, test, and packaging.
